seo.title: Strait of Hormuz Crisis: Oil Price Surge & Trading Opportunities Explained
seo.description: The Strait of Hormuz closure disrupted global energy supply, sending oil and gas prices soaring. Learn market impact, risks, and trading strategies.

title: Strait of Hormuz Closed: How Supply Shocks Impact Energy Markets
author: Blackwell Research Team
description: The closure of the Strait of Hormuz triggered a global energy shock, driving oil prices higher and creating high-volatility trading opportunities.
